content:
"follow instructions on breaking wills of friends and lovers so thought as main problem and letdown of master Persona and fetus-proprietus:

No order required, chaos and random, the perfect cocktail for confusion and precipitation of doubt and reference to reality outside of forced upon collared one:

0) stomp feet often and always, break for rests, but always victimize and req validation
1) slowly poison all goodwell
2) make mad requests
3) force the other to seesaw theirs and your weight
4) be annoyed by every breathe and kindness as if presence is an inconvenience at cellular levels
5) only talk about things that other is not or can not provide
6) convince them to shape-shift to please the unpleasable
7) never ever compliment
8) and of course, do it in front of their face and tell them what you're doing as you do it, a true showmen of nihilism always feeds off a multi layered energy vampirism...like monsters Inc but really

And that's that that that uh that that at Ata at tt t t that's alllllll folks
context: From document: INT. Altar of My Ego — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
